title: Onions
content:
Can the Burbanks of the glorious West
        Either make or buy or sell
     An onion with an onion's taste
        But with a violet's smell?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Onions", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
